title: Flocking
description: Allows entities to flock in groups in water or not.

block_distance.title: Block Distance
block_distance.description:
The amount of blocks away the entity will look at to push away from.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 1

block_weight.title: Block Weight
block_weight.description: The weight of the push back away from blocks.

breach_influence.title: Breach Influence
breach_influence.description: The amount of push back given to a flocker that breaches out of the water.

cohesion_threshold.title: Cohesion Threshold
cohesion_threshold.description:
The threshold in which to start applying cohesion.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 6.5

cohesion_weight.title: Cohesion Weight
cohesion_weight.description:
The weight applied for the cohesion steering of the flock.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 1.85

goal_weight.title: Goal Weight
goal_weight.description:
The weight on which to apply on the goal output.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 2

high_flock_limit.title: High Flock Limit
high_flock_limit.description:
Determines the high bound amount of entities that can be allowed in the flock.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 8

in_water.title: In Water
in_water.description: Tells the Flocking Component if the entity exists in water.

influence_radius.title: Influence Radius
influence_radius.description:
The area around the entity that allows others to be added to the flock.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 6

innner_cohesion_threshold.title: Innner Cohesion Threshold
innner_cohesion_threshold.description:
The distance in which the flocker will stop applying cohesion.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 3.5

loner_chance.title: Loner Chance
loner_chance.description:
The percentage chance between 0-1 that a fish will spawn and not want to join flocks. Invalid values will be capped at the end points.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 0.1

low_flock_limit.title: Low Flock Limit
low_flock_limit.description:
Determines the low bound amount of entities that can be allowed in the flock.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 4

match_variants.title: Match Variants
match_variants.description: Tells the flockers that they can only match similar entities that also match the variant, mark variants, and color data of the other potential flockers.

max_height.title: Max Height
max_height.description:
The max height allowable in the air or water.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 4

min_height.title: Min Height
min_height.description:
The min height allowable in the air or water.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 4

separation_threshold.title: Separation Threshold
separation_threshold.description:
The distance that is determined to be to close to another flocking and to start applying separation.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 3

separation_weight.title: Separation Weight
separation_weight.description:
The weight applied to the separation of the flock.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 1.75

use_center_of_mass.title: Use Center Of Mass
use_center_of_mass.description: Tells the flockers that they will follow flocks based on the center of mass.
